---
title: "d4"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---
##5.1
```{r}
n=4
A=matrix(0,n,n)
A[upper.tri(A,diag=TRUE)]=1 
fc=function(x) {
  Ax=A%*%x
  t1=t(x)%*%t(A)%*%A%*%x
  t2=0.1*sum(Ax^3)
  t3=0.01*sum(Ax^4)
  return(as.numeric(t1+t2+t3))
}

gf=function(x) {
  Ax=A%*%x
  g1=2*t(A)%*%A%*%x
  g2=0.1*3*t(A)%*%(Ax^2)
  g3=0.01*4*t(A)%*%(Ax^3)
  return(as.vector(g1+g2+g3))
}
```


```{r}
xk=rep(0.2, n)
alpha=0.01 
mi= 100

is=data.frame(
  it=0:mi, 
  fv=numeric(mi+1)
)
is$fv[1]=fc(xk)
```


```{r}
for (k in 1:mi) {
  pk=-gf(xk)
  xk=xk+alpha*pk
  is$fv[k+1]=fc(xk)
}

print(paste("Finalna vrednost funkcije:", fc(xk)))
print("Finalne vrednosti x vektora:")
print(xk)
```

```{r}
plot(is$it, is$fv, type = "b", 
     pch = 19, col = "deeppink",
     xlab = "Iteracija", ylab = "f(x)", 
     main = "Konvergencija gradient descent postupka")

grid()
```
